arena_events.name: Arena Fog
arena_events.description: A mysterious fog rolls into the arena, reducing visibility
narrative_templates: A thick, unnatural fog begins to creep across the arena floor, obscuring vision and creating an atmosphere of tension.
The Gamemakers release a dense fog that blankets the arena, making it difficult for tributes to see more than a few feet ahead.
Fog rolls in from the edges of the arena, bringing with it an eerie silence broken only by distant, muffled sounds.

arena_events.name: Arena Quake
arena_events.description: The ground shakes violently, causing structural damage
narrative_templates: The arena floor begins to shake violently as an artificial earthquake is triggered by the Gamemakers.
A massive tremor rocks the arena, causing trees to fall and ground to crack open beneath tributes' feet.
The entire arena convulses as seismic activity engineered by the Capitol creates chaos among the competitors.

arena_events.name: Arena Storm
arena_events.description: A sudden storm brings dangerous weather conditions
narrative_templates: Dark clouds gather overhead as a violent storm is unleashed upon the arena by the Gamemakers.
Thunder crashes and lightning illuminates the sky as a manufactured tempest rages through the arena.
Rain begins to pour in sheets, turning the arena into a muddy battlefield where footing becomes treacherous.

arena_events.name: Arena Wildlife
arena_events.description: Dangerous mutated animals are released into the arena
narrative_templates: Strange, mutated creatures begin to emerge from the shadows of the arena, their eyes glowing with unnatural hunger.
The Gamemakers release genetically engineered beasts into the arena, forcing tributes to contend with new predators.
Wolves, bears, and other dangerous animals, altered by Capitol science, roam the arena seeking prey.

arena_events.name: Artificial Night
arena_events.description: The arena is plunged into darkness earlier than expected
narrative_templates: The sun appears to set prematurely as the Gamemakers darken the arena, forcing tributes to navigate in near-total darkness.
Artificial night falls upon the arena, with only the glow of the Cornucopia providing any illumination.
The sky darkens unnaturally as the Gamemakers plunge the arena into night, heightening the sense of danger and isolation.
